member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.BandsController.GetAll
member.remarks: Returns the complete list of bands currently stored in the database.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.BandsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Returns a single band when the provided ID exists.
member.response: No band exists with the provided ID.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.BandsController.GetWithCds(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves a band by ID including related CDs.
member.remarks: Returns a single band with its associated CD collection when the ID exists.
member.response: Band with related CDs retrieved successfully.
No band exists with the provided ID.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.BandsController.Create(criacao_api4.Models.Band)
member.remarks: Creates a band using the request payload and returns the created resource location.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.BandsController.Update(System.Int32,criacao_api4.Models.Band)
member.remarks: Updates the band identified by the route ID using the provided payload.
member.response: No band exists with the provided ID.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.BandsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Removes the band identified by the route ID if it exists.
member.response: No band exists with the provided ID.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.CdsController.GetAll
member.remarks: Returns the complete list of CDs currently stored in the database.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.CdsController.GetById(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Returns a single CD when the provided ID exists.
member.response: No CD exists with the provided ID.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.CdsController.GetByBand(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Returns all CDs associated with the specified band identifier.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.CdsController.GetByName(System.String)
member.remarks: Performs a name-based search and returns matching CDs.
member.param: Name or partial name used for filtering CDs.
member.response: The name query parameter is missing or invalid.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.CdsController.Create(criacao_api4.Models.Cd)
member.remarks: Creates a CD using the request payload and returns the created resource location.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.CdsController.Update(System.Int32,criacao_api4.Models.Cd)
member.remarks: Updates the CD identified by the route ID using the provided payload.
member.response: No CD exists with the provided ID.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.CdsController.Delete(System.Int32)
member.remarks: Removes the CD identified by the route ID if it exists.
member.response: No CD exists with the provided ID.

member.name: M:criacao_api4.Controllers.MusicBrainzController.GetRelease(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves releases from MusicBrainz by release name.
member.remarks: Returns a list of matching releases from the external MusicBrainz API.
member.param: Release name used to search on MusicBrainz.
member.response: The provided release name is invalid.
MusicBrainz is unavailable or returned an invalid response.
